reviews.review_description:
I have been following the Highstreet project since it was first launched, and it has been almost 5 years since I became part of this journey. I have been holding HIGH tokens and I also own a Solarium, a Dragon pet, and a Duck pet. After such a long wait, the game has finally been released, and I was excited to experience it.

After playing the game, I have to say that the visual details are really impressive. The world design looks great, and the combat mechanics feel smooth and easy to learn. It is a great first step toward the vision that Highstreet has been building for years.

However, at the moment, the game is still limited to the Combat Arena with only a single-player mode, which feels a little disappointing because I believe Highstreet has much more potential.

I hope that in the future, we can see more features added, such as:

- A larger open world where players can explore, hunt monsters, and level up.
- Bringing our Dragon and Duck pets into the game as companions.
- Giving Solarium houses a real purpose and utility within the game world.
- Adding more character classes, such as Archer, Mage, and Spearman, to create more diverse gameplay styles.

Although the project is currently facing some negative news and challenges related to the Binance exchange, I still hope the Highstreet team will continue building, improving the game, and bringing Highstreet back stronger than ever.

As a long-term supporter, I truly hope to see the full vision of Highstreet become reality. Keep building, Highstreet team!

This VR game delivers a highly immersive experience with stunning visuals and beautifully detailed environments. Each monster has unique behaviors that make every battle dynamic and engaging. The combat feels smooth and satisfying, creating an exciting and enjoyable experience throughout. It’s a great choice for anyone who loves visually impressive VR action games.

That's a cool game! Combat is complex but intuitive, with a lot unique monsters that make the battles interesting. Unique art style and good SFX creates good immersion. Overall good game, highly recommend!

I had a great time with this game. Each monster features unique attack patterns that push you to adapt your strategy rather than rely on brute force. The visuals are solid, and the effects deliver a satisfying sense of impact. Overall, it’s a worthwhile pick if you enjoy VR fighting games.

Really enjoyed playing Highstreet: Calamity. The scale of the experience is awesome, and battling waves of bots is super fun. Love the visuals and gameplay, highly recommend for anyone looking for an immersive and stunning VR game

I had a great time with this game. Drawing gestures to cast spells is amazing, very unique. The monsters are cute and the effects were satisfying. Overall, it’s a worthwhile pick if you enjoy VR fighting games.

reviews.review_title: It's A Whole New World - it's Amazing!
reviews.review_description:
The world design is beautiful - the environment, the characters (the ducks are so adorable), the monsters, VFX, and the sounds!

Anyone who loves monsters (cute and scary) and battles will definitely enjoy it!
